scripts.build: bun run embed-assets && bun build --compile src/index.tsx --outfile dist/odinslist
scripts.build:linux-x64: bun run embed-assets && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/index.tsx --outfile dist/odinslist-linux-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun run embed-assets && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 src/index.tsx --outfile dist/odinslist-linux-arm64
scripts.build:darwin-x64: bun run embed-assets && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 src/index.tsx --outfile dist/odinslist-darwin-x64
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: bun run embed-assets && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/index.tsx --outfile dist/odinslist-darwin-arm64
